LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE FEB-25-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT PHILADELPHIA INDEMNITY INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION AND OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST, THIRD, FOURTH, AND FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING.) THE DEFENDANTS ARE REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2022 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-25-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT PHILADELPHIA INDEMNITY INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant's demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the second cause of action and overruled as to the first, third, fourth, and fifth causes of action. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

The defendants are required to prepare and submit proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
